siphon 0.8.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Asynchronous Daemons
    • Extending siphon with Custom Backends
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

format(<pump>)
Format a pump pipeline
format(<pump_status>)
Format a pipeline status snapshot
future_backend()
Create a future backend
length(<pump>)
Number of items in a pump pipeline
main_backend()
Create a main-thread backend
mirai_backend()
Create a mirai backend
parallel_backend()
Create a parallel (PSOCK) backend
parallel_eval_workers()
Evaluate an expression on all workers of a parallel backend
parallel_setup_workers()
Run setup code on all workers of a parallel backend
parallel_stop()
Stop a parallel backend
print(<pump>)
Print a pump pipeline
print(<pump_backend>)
Print a backend
print(<pump_status>)
Print a pump_status object
pump()
Add a processing stage to a pipeline
pump_custom_backend()
Create a custom backend from plain functions
pump_drain()
Drain a siphon pipeline
pump_item_registry()
Create an item registry for custom sources
pump_managed_source()
Create a managed custom source
pump_peek()
Peek at ready results without consuming them
pump_pop()
Consume one ready result from a pipeline
pump_run()
Run a siphon pipeline and collect results
pump_source()
Create a custom siphon source
pump_status()
Pipeline status
pump_step()
Advance a pipeline without consuming results

Developed by Rolf Simoes.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
